name: The Duskway Runs
description: Blockade-running for the Earth resistance. The crew flies the Loup-Garou through Compact-controlled space to deliver people, medicine, and testimony out of a system the Compact has decided does not get to trade with the rest of the galaxy. Tove's arc is the spine of this storyline.

arcs.summary: Tove brings the crew into the Duskway network. The first run is the one where the captain learns what 'Duskway' actually means.
By the third run, the Duskway network begins to treat the Loup-Garou as a known quantity. Tove's trust shifts permanently.
A run that carries people, not cargo. The cost of the Duskway becomes concrete.
